item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Pasta alla Norma: Sicilian pasta with fried aubergines in an intense, aromatic tomato sauce, served with parmesan and crispy breadcrumbs. (1+6+10+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Summer closure Grab&Go Grab&Go is still available in the fridge as usual. Take-away

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Okonomiyaki: Japanese cabbage pancake with noodles and vegetables, topped with nori and wasabi-spiced sesame seeds. Served with okonomiyaki sauce, Japanese mayonnaise and umami-spiced chickpea fritters. Also available gluten-free. (1+2+6+7+8+15)
